answers: You didn't come this far to only come this far. Pain is temporary, quitting is forever. Push harder!
Get up. You've survived 100% of your worst days. The grind you avoid today is the gap between you and your goals. Push through!
No more excuses. Every second you hesitate, someone else is working. Your future self is counting on what you do RIGHT NOW.
Hard days build the strongest people. Feel the resistance, then do it anyway. Champions aren't made in comfort zones — get moving!
